assessment_items.question_content:
**Late Republic sculptors emphasized which of the following features in portrait sculpture?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Late Republic sculptors emphasized the age and wisdom of the subject in portrait sculpture.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-400-c-e--ancient-cultures-1/ancient-rome/v/veristic-male-portrait)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Late Republic portraits are supposed to be true to life, but they may exaggerate. . .**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**These portraits are supposed to be true to life, but they may exaggerate the age of the figures to conform to the Roman ideal of age and experience**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-400-c-e--ancient-cultures-1/ancient-rome/v/veristic-male-portrait)**

choices.content: the physical strength of the figures
the curls of the figures' hair

assessment_items.question_content:
**The senators who ruled Rome came from elite families.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Senators ruled Rome and came from elite families. **

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-400-c-e--ancient-cultures-1/ancient-rome/v/veristic-male-portrait)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Later Roman portrait sculpture, under the Emperor Augustus,  looks back to the Greek ideals of age and wisdom.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Portrait sculpture, under the Emperor Augustus, looks back to the Greek ideals of youth and beauty.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-400-c-e--ancient-cultures-1/ancient-rome/v/veristic-male-portrait)**
